The block name '*D353' is an anonymous *D-prefixed name, which AutoCAD generates only for associative-dimension geometry caches; vertical dim line 8D78 measures a 2640-unit height, stacked below *D352.
rationale.rule: An anonymous *D### block whose contents are exclusively DIM-layer lines, arrowhead inserts (DIMDOT), one numeric MTEXT, and DEFPOINTS points is the internal geometry cache of a DIMENSION entity, not drawn model content. This signature transfers to any DWG regardless of discipline or scale.
rationale.counterfactual: If the block contained geometry on wall/architectural layers (e.g. WALL, A-WALL), closed parallel line pairs at wall-thickness offsets, hatches, or a non-numeric name, the judgment would flip toward 평면 부분도 or 기타. Absence of the DEFPOINTS points or of the *D name pattern would also weaken the 치수캐시 call.
rationale.uncertainty: The projection cannot show which model entity this dimension measures or whether the parent DIMENSION is still associative, so what the '2640' value refers to (wall, opening, furniture, grid) is unknown. Only a max-30 entity sample is given, though here entity_count matches the sample so truncation risk is nil.

notes: Anonymous *D dimension-cache block: DIM-layer extension/dimension lines + DIMDOT arrows + MTEXT '3905' + DEFPOINTS points; no wall geometry.
